title: Buttondown vs Moosend (2025): Which Is Better?
meta_description: Compare Buttondown vs Moosend: pricing, features, and best use cases for email marketing in 2025.
h1: Buttondown vs Moosend: Complete Comparison Guide
intro: Both Buttondown and Moosend are freemium email marketing platforms starting at $9/month, but they serve different audiences. Buttondown caters to developers and technical writers with markdown support, while Moosend targets small businesses seeking unlimited emails and advanced automation. Choosing between them depends on your technical preferences and feature priorities.
choose_a_if: You write newsletters in markdown and prefer a developer-friendly interface
You need API access for custom integrations and automation
You value simplicity and minimalist design over advanced features
choose_b_if: You need a free tier supporting up to 1,000 subscribers instead of 100
You want landing pages and subscription forms built-in
You require A/B testing and real-time analytics capabilities
You're interested in earning 30% recurring affiliate commissions

faq.a: Neither is objectively better—it depends on your needs. Buttondown excels for technical users who write in markdown and need API access, while Moosend is superior for general businesses seeking more features and a generous free tier. Moosend has higher overall ratings and more comprehensive functionality.

faq.q: Which is cheaper, Buttondown or Moosend?
faq.a: Both start at $9/month for paid plans, making them equally priced at the entry level. However, Moosend's free tier accommodates 1,000 subscribers compared to Buttondown's 100, making Moosend more cost-effective for growing businesses staying on the free plan longer.

faq.q: Can I switch from Moosend to Buttondown?
faq.a: Yes, both platforms support import/export functionality, making migration straightforward. Both tools allow you to export your subscriber lists and email templates, though you may need to reformat content if switching to Buttondown's markdown-based system.
